title: Review the working changes
description: Review the current uncommitted diff for correctness, bugs, and convention drift before committing.
prompt: Review the current working-tree changes (run `git diff` and `git diff --staged`). For each change, check: does it do what it claims, are there bugs or missed edge cases, does it follow the conventions of the surrounding code, and is it adequately tested? Report findings grouped by severity ({{severity}} and above). Be concise — cite each finding as file_path:line. Do not change any code; this is a review only.

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Minimum severity of findings to report
